workshoptitle: Apache Iceberg Table Migration on OCI

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Overview of the simulated AWS S3 to OCI Object Storage Iceberg migration flow.

tutorials.title: Get Started
tutorials.description: This is the prerequisites for customers using Free Trial and Paid tenancies, and Always Free accounts (if applicable). The title of the lab and the Contents Menu title (the title above) match for Prerequisite lab. This lab is always second.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Provision Infrastructure
tutorials.description: Deploy the OCI network, compute VM, Object Storage bucket, and VM bootstrap automation.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Generate the Source Iceberg Table
tutorials.description: Run the provided script to create a real source Iceberg table with Spark and MinIO.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Copy Iceberg Files to OCI Object Storage
tutorials.description: Copy the generated Iceberg data and metadata files into OCI Object Storage.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Register and Validate the Iceberg Table
tutorials.description: Register the copied table in an Iceberg JDBC catalog and validate it with Spark and optional Trino.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Cleanup
tutorials.description: Destroy the demo resources and clean up the environment.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Solutions to Common Problems and Directions for Receiving Live Help
